arts.ttl: ‘Completely different’: Shaun Wright-Phillips says Arsenal’s style has changed because of £30m player
arts.sum: Arsenal sit third in the Premier League, but their recent form isn’t actually that great. The Gunners have won just three of their last six...

arts.ttl: Arsenal make decision on William Saliba red card appeal
arts.sum: Arsenal will not appeal the red card William Saliba received during their 2-0 defeat at Bournemouth on Saturday, meaning he will miss the upcoming clash with Premier League title rivals Liverpool. The suspension is a domestic one, meaning Saliba is free to play in Arsenal's Champions League clash with Shakhtar Donestsk on Tuesday, though The Times say no appeal will be lodged.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star fighting to save his career as transfer demands intensify amid shocking statistic - Joe Doyle
arts.sum: Last year in the league, the Gunners averaged 2.4 goals per game, scoring 91 in total across their 38 games - a stunning return. And one man really in need of a goal in the league is Gabriel Jesus .

arts.ttl: Arsenal star sends four-word message to Neymar after 12-month injury lay-off
arts.sum: Gabriel, who has made four appearances for Brazil alongside Neymar, has sent a message to his compatriot after the return from injury. Arsenal star Gabriel Magalhaes has sent a message to Neymar following his compatriot's return to the pitch.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Man City verdict after two controversial VAR decisions
arts.sum: Refereeing and VAR decisions in the Premier League at the weekend could have a major impact on the title race for Arsenal, according to football.london readers. In a separate vote, football.london readers were also asked if they believe City receive more favourable decisions with VAR compared to Arsenal.

arts.ttl: The £465m Arsenal problem that shows why Emirates plan will be crucial
arts.sum: The challenge for Arsenal, particularly after having spent a large part of the last decade on the outside looking in, falling away from the title chatter on an annual basis and missing out on the chance to grow revenues at a hugely lucrative time for Premier League clubs, with the likes of Manchester City, Liverpool, and even Tottenham Hotspur capitalising on the opportunity, is that revenues still fall short of their title rivals. While the figure places Arsenal third on the list for the 2022/23 accounting period, behind Spurs (£118m) and Manchester United (£136m), the expansion of Liverpool’s Anfield Road End to take the capacity to 61,000 means that they are likely to be in the £100m-plus club by the time the 2024/25 financial results arrive.

arts.ttl: Arsenal expected XI vs Shakhtar Donetsk as Saka misses out, Timber decision made
arts.sum: "It was very difficult already with the amount of players that we had out and the schedule and the games that we had to play, but that's the reality. "And now the context is that we have lost one game in six months.

arts.ttl: New Premier League rule could form basis for Arsenal Saliba red card appeal
arts.sum: Saliba picked up Arsenal's third red card of the season for denying a clear goalscoring opportunity when hauling down Evanilson. Referees are told to consider four things when deciding if a foul has denied a clear goalscoring opportunity.

arts.ttl: €100m! Chelsea interest drives up price of Arsenal target
arts.sum: The 20-year-old continues to make headlines in England and Germany, despite the fact that he is not even a guaranteed starter for Dortmund . German media claims that Borussia Dortmund are only willing to listen to €100 million offers for Jamie Gittens .

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid move ahead of Arsenal in race for African teenager?
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are reportedly ahead of Arsenal in the race for Mali youth international Baye Coulibaly, with the Spanish club submitting a bid for the midfielder.
